caption: A man with a long gray beard and a black hat, looking slightly away from the camera, with text overlaid that reads, “i do not like taking pictures” at the top and “oh well, go ahead take it” at the bottom.
The image displays a city skyline at dusk or dawn with a prominent skyscraper in the center, overlaid with the bold white text "everybody hates chris" in a large, sans-serif font.
A black-and-white photograph shows three young Black children standing together, with overlaid text reading "4 years with these kids" at the top and "I'm tired" at the bottom.

A man in a white shirt and black tie, wearing glasses and an apron, is focused on stirring contents in a large metal bowl in a professional kitchen setting, with the text overlay "Local restaurant gets new slow cooker."

The image shows a contemplative-looking gorilla with its arms crossed, set against a plain, dark brown background, with white text at the top and bottom reading, “how i stare at the homie” and “when i know he's lying,” respectively.
A man with a distressed expression, eyes closed, mouth open, and hands raised with fingers spread, as if reacting to something upsetting, with the text "My face when racism exists" above him.
A black-and-white photo shows several men in military-style uniforms raising their right hands in a salute, with bold white text overlaid on the image that reads "raise your hand if you're trash."
A woman with Down syndrome is seen in a mirror applying makeup in a bathroom, with text overlay reading "down syndrome girl put on makeup for a party."

The image is a two-panel meme comparing "polish remover" products, with the top panel showing a WWII-era soldier holding a rifle labeled "polish remover 1940," and the bottom panel displaying modern beauty products including cotton pads, cotton swabs, and a bottle labeled "polish remover 2019."

A person in a full protective bomb disposal suit, including helmet and gloves, is walking on a dirt field while holding a device in one hand and a small white object in the other, with text overlay reading "When your Muslim gf invites you over for dinner."
A man wearing a white head covering and a black headband smiles at the camera against a green backdrop, with text overlaid at the top and bottom.

A black-and-white portrait of Adolf Hitler in a military-style uniform with his arms crossed, overlaid with text that reads, "i could have annihilated all of them" at the top and "but i left some of them alive so you will know why i was killing them" at the bottom.

A Black man dressed as Santa Claus, wearing a red and white fur-trimmed suit and hat, smiles while holding a white teddy bear and a football, seated on an ornate chair against a dark red background with the text "black santa" at the bottom.
A black-and-white portrait of Adolf Hitler with text overlay reading "kills: 17 million, deaths: 1" at the top and "Worst man ever" at the bottom.
A man stands at night in a forested area, with a large, spiky, lion-like creature towering beside him, and text overlaid that reads "had secret door before it was cool."
A young man in a light blue shirt smiles at the camera while holding a lit menorah with multiple candles burning in the background.
The image shows a man with soap on his head under a shower, with the text "vanish shampoo" above him, and below him, a monkey in a cage holding something.
The image shows an aerial view of a city skyline, prominently featuring the Twin Towers of the World Trade Center, with the text "Imagine a world without hate" overlaid on the image.
A family is having a picnic on a grassy area near a body of water, with text overlaid that reads "just admit it, summer picnics are better."
A man in a white shirt is being escorted by police officers, one of whom is holding his arm, with text overlaid that reads “if i was arrested what do u think i got arrested 4?”

The image is a two-panel meme: the top panel shows a young Black boy smiling at the camera, with the text "be kind to others and animals" overlaid, while the bottom panel displays a close-up of a gorilla looking directly forward.
A black-and-white photograph shows two men sitting on a bench outdoors, both smiling and laughing, with text overlaid that reads “Put the laughter back in manslaughter.”
A woman and a young girl are sitting on a hardwood floor playing with colorful building blocks, with houseplants and furniture visible in the background.
A man in a crowd is shouting with an intense expression, pointing forward, while others around him raise their fists and hold flags.

An older man in a wheelchair, viewed from behind, stretches his arms up with hands open, facing a large window, while text overlays read "heeeadddd shoulders" above his head and "wheel and frame wheel and frame" below the wheelchair.
A smiling woman in a black tank top and colorful leggings is running outdoors on a grassy path surrounded by trees, holding a water bottle, with the text "i love to run" above her.
A Black woman in a police uniform looks directly at the camera with a serious expression, while a white man in a police uniform stands behind her in a police station setting.

A person with a bandaged head and visible injuries to the face, including a cut near the mouth and a red mark on the cheek, is touching their lip, with text overlaid that reads "oops. broke the dishwasher again."

A smiling Black man with a short beard and mustache, wearing a black turtleneck and a gray patterned suit jacket, is pictured against a blurred background with green foliage and a hint of red flowers.

A person lies on their back in a bed of dry leaves, covered in what appears to be blood, with their arms outstretched and eyes closed, under the text "the face you make when you don't understand what 'stop resisting' means."
A man in an orange shirt and bandana shares a snack with a goat against a clear blue sky, with text reading "lunch prayers answered."
A young girl is swimming in a clear blue swimming pool with the text "4 ways to boil vegetables" overlaid at the top.
A three-panel meme featuring a person holding a sign, the White House illuminated in rainbow colors, and a photo of Barack Obama, each with overlaid text.
A police officer is escorting a handcuffed man out of a house at night, with a stone wall and a window visible in the background.

A black-and-white photograph shows a man in a military uniform smiling and shaking hands with people around him while seated in an open-top car, with a crowd cheering and raising their arms in the background.

The image shows a sepia-toned depiction of Jesus on the cross against a cloudy sky, with text overlaid that reads "jew jerky: leave out in the sun until all moisture is gone" and "store in a cool dark place for 3 days."
The image shows a man in a red plaid shirt with a terrified expression, wearing a backpack, while a large hairy creature resembling Bigfoot looms behind him, also appearing to be in a forested area.

A pregnant woman lies on a medical exam table while a healthcare professional performs an ultrasound, with text overlaid that reads, "LOOK... ALREADY HAS A WARRANT."
A dishwasher is shown with its lower rack loaded with plates, bowls, and utensils, and the text "loading the dishwasher in the back solid move" is overlaid on the image.
An older man with glasses and a beard, wearing a gray sweater over a collared shirt, is smiling against a plain background, with bold text overlaid at the top and bottom of the image.

The image shows two anthropomorphized food items—a potato and an avocado—drawn with smiling faces and arms, lying together under a floral-patterned blanket against a pink background, with the text "when you told her you was going to fuck her till she was stupid" overlaid at the top.
A man dressed in a costume resembling a religious figure with a tall white hat and striped robe is raising his hand, while other people in costumes and regular clothing stand around him outdoors.

The image is a meme split into two parts: the top shows two people holding hands on a couch with the text "love is more powerful," and the bottom features a historical illustration of a man in a hat surrounded by a crowd, with the text "than any other force in the world."
A close-up of a purple glitter lipstick in a black tube against a white background, with the text "she put on the purple lipstick and she became the bomb" overlaid at the bottom.
Three women in white dresses and floral crowns are positioned side by side, each labeled with a year: "miss 2016," "miss 2017," and "miss 2018."
A young boy stands on a dirt path in a lush green forest, holding a small white and black goat, with text overlaid at the top and bottom of the image.
The image shows five young girls wearing colorful head coverings, smiling and looking toward the camera, with text overlaid at the top and bottom.

The image displays the flag of Israel, featuring two horizontal blue stripes and a blue Star of David centered on a white background, with the text "this is the worst cancer i've ever seen" at the bottom.
A diverse group of smiling people is posing together, with text overlaid that reads, "similar to sharks because they all have teeth."
A person is standing in front of an open dishwasher, reaching into the lower rack to adjust or retrieve items, with text overlaid on the image reading "the fucking dishwasher is acting up!"

A black-and-white photograph shows the main gate of a concentration camp with the inscription "ARBEIT MACHT FREI" above it, snow covering the ground, and a caption at the bottom reading "now it only remains a reminder of the past."

A young male student with reddish hair, wearing a white shirt and tie with a backpack, is shown from behind opening a locker in a school hallway, while several other students are blurred in the background.
Two men in suits are seated at a wooden table, laughing together as they look at a phone, with text overlay reading "ha!!" and "i won an award!!".
A birthday cake topped with lit, colorful candles and sprinkles, with text overlay asking “porn casting or terrorist recruitment?” and responding “-yes i can blow.”
A young child with a surprised or shocked expression looks directly at the camera, with text overlaid that reads "when mommy says a bad word."

The image displays two separate photographs: the top one shows a joyful young boy holding a rugby ball above his head, and the bottom one features a chimpanzee dressed in a red sports jersey and holding a soccer ball, with text overlaying both images reading "both humans and animals can enjoy sports."
A woman wearing a light-colored hijab smiles while playing a ukulele, with text overlaid on the image reading "this one is called sexy times with that sheep of mine."
A man with glasses and short hair sits in a wheelchair, smiling slightly with his head tilted, as text at the bottom reads "The original derp-fac."

A man with glasses and a beard sits in a dimly lit office, looking directly at the camera, while two colleagues work at computers in the background; text overlays read, "The difference between this and darkness?" and "One won't rob you."
A young boy and a chimpanzee, both wearing glasses and business suits, sit at a desk with office supplies and a phone, with text above and below the image.

The image is a black-and-white photograph of Adolf Hitler giving a speech, with his right arm raised in a Nazi salute; text overlays at the top and bottom read “the gas bill is too damn high funny offensive” and “memes offensive pictures ever most.”
The image shows soldiers in uniform carrying large red and white covered objects, with the text "Keep Ulster tidy 1973" at the top and "get rid of the rubbish" at the bottom.

A plus-size woman with short dark hair, wearing a light green bikini top and white bottoms, stands in a grassy yard next to a swimming pool using two crutches, with a tattoo visible on her right thigh, and trees in the background.

A young girl with blonde hair, wearing a red sweater with white patterns, holds a black handgun in her right hand while looking off to the side with a stern expression, with the text “white kids be like” above her and “i have had enough” below her.
A young man and woman are taking a selfie together in front of a chain-link fence, with the text overlay reading “when your little bomber brings home his first girlfriend.”
A brown goat with horns stands in a green field under a bright blue sky, looking directly at the camera, with the text "mohamed, i'm pregnant" overlaid at the top.

A person with blonde hair and sunglasses is smoking a cigarette outdoors, with smoke visible around their face, and text overlaid on the image reads "this one time at camp" at the top and "we got baked" at the bottom.
A black-and-white photograph of Adolf Hitler seated at a table with a cup, glass, and bottle in front of him, looking to the side, with the text "DID SOMEONE SAY GAS?" superimposed at the top.

Two cats wearing pineapple-themed hats and glasses, one looking sad and the other excited, with text above and below referencing an inappropriate answer to a question about favorite X-Men character.

The image is a two-panel meme: the top panel shows a light blue vintage Volkswagen Beetle with the text "vw cars produce more gas than expected," and the bottom panel features a black-and-white portrait of Adolf Hitler with the text "ach! that's my car."
A tabby cat is sitting inside an open oven, looking out, with the text "cat chillin in china" overlaid on the image.

A black-and-white photograph shows a smiling woman in an apron holding a plate, standing in a kitchen beside a sink filled with dishes, with text overlaid at the bottom reading "happy international sandwich maker's day from make aus grouse again".

A man in the foreground is yelling and pointing forward with an intense expression, surrounded by a crowd of people raising their fists and holding flags, with the words "rape" and "helping them have sex for generations" superimposed on the image.

Five young adults are smiling and posing closely together in a casual indoor setting, with the text "what's better than chilling with friends" overlaid at the top.
A woman with an excited expression is seen through the circular door of a front-loading washing machine, with text overlaid that reads "rare picture of a dishwasher at birth."
Two smiling women stand side-by-side against a pink background, with text overlaid that reads, "they're in a relationship, who makes the other laugh the most?"

A black-and-white photograph shows Adolf Hitler seated at a table with a young girl beside him, both looking toward the camera, with a window and snowy landscape visible behind them.

A photograph of the World Trade Center towers with one building emitting a large plume of smoke, overlaid with text reading "I was just chilling there ... and suddenly I got WiFi from an airplane."

Five people stand in a line behind a glass table in an office with clocks displaying different time zones on the wall, with text above and below the image reading, "When they gather on a porch. It's called an auction."
